decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 0.7% and S&P 500 up 0.6%, a favorable backdrop for the existing portfolio's growth and small-cap tilt. Cash is $477.14 — just below the $500 threshold — so no new positions can be opened today despite four open slots and several high-conviction candidates like FOUR, BLDR, and AFRM showing textbook momentum setups. All six existing holdings remain in bullish market conditions; holding steady and letting the winners run.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly today in a risk-on session, with the NASDAQ leading as investors rotated back into growth and technology names. Easing macro concerns and continued resilience in consumer spending data kept sentiment constructive. Momentum names with bullish MACD crossovers and RSI in the 55–70 zone — such as homebuilders, fintech, and retail — outperformed as buyers extended recent breakouts.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日普遍上揚，風險偏好情緒明顯改善，納斯達克指數領漲，資金重新流入成長股與科技板塊。宏觀面憂慮持續緩解，加上消費數據維持韌性，市場情緒整體積極。動能強勁、MACD 出現金叉且 RSI 處於 55–70 區間的股票表現突出，包括房屋建築商、金融科技及零售類股，買盤延續近期突破走勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag occurs when uninvested cash sits idle in a portfolio during a rising market, causing the portfolio to underperform compared to if that cash were deployed. Today illustrates this: with four open slots and several high-momentum candidates available, the portfolio can't act because cash fell just below the $500 minimum threshold — meaning the upside from stocks like FOUR or BLDR is missed.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指在市場上漲期間，投資組合中有閒置現金未被投入，導致整體報酬落後於滿倉部署時的理論表現。今日情況正是如此：儘管有四個空缺部位，且多檔強勢股可供進場，但現金僅剩 $477，略低於最低門檻 $500，因而無法行動，錯過如 FOUR、BLDR 等個股的潛在漲幅。
